name: Ox Tail Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pkg. of ox tail (or reg. stew meat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Boil the meat in 2 quarts of water until it is tender.
2. Add potatoes, onion, celery, and carrots to the pot. When these vegetables are almost done cooking, add corn, tomatoes, and tomato sauce, along with salt and pepper.
3. Continue cooking over medium heat until the flavors are well blended.
4. If desired, add macaroni when you add frozen corn.
5. If desired, add okra after all other vegetables have been added.
6. Serve with hot cornbread or saltine crackers.
